name: zenetusken-plugins
description: Plugins by Zenetusken for Claude Code.

plugins.name: consolidate-memory
plugins.description: Cross-project, verification-first memory beyond Auto Dream: shares fact-checked memory across your whole fleet (a governed global store) and verifies facts against the live code, dropping what it can't confirm, with tiered context-budget + network token observability.

plugins.name: dream-beta-tester
plugins.description: QA companion to consolidate-memory: beta-tests the "dream" skill itself. A deterministic invariant oracle + a judgment-lens skill (/dream-beta-test) that finds defects, regressions, and dishonest reports in the consolidation skill — honest by construction (confirmed vs suspected kept separate). Includes a maintainer continuous-QA pre-push gate with a frozen self-test canary + a deterministic orchestrator contract (latest.json) for autonomous release self-heal.
